title: ANSYS Inc. (ANSS) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: An analysis of the intrinsic value of ANSYS Inc. Note that ANSYS became a subsidiary of Synopsys on July 17, 2025, and is no longer traded independently.
methodology: DCF analysis is not applicable because ANSYS Inc. became a subsidiary of Synopsys on July 17, 2025, and its current price data is unavailable.
